description: The TutorialScreen component controls a screen prompting the user to go through the tutorial in their dash.

fields.Icon: The icon for this dialogue screen.
fields.ActiveColor: The color when this screen is selected and active.
fields.Label: The label of this dash screen.
fields.ScreenEnabled: Whether this dash screen is enabled or not.
fields.BaseResolution: The resolution this screen renders at.
fields._screenRoot: The root slot of this screen's visual elements.
fields._screenCanvas: The canvas Component used to render this dash screen.
fields._modalOverlayManager: This is the Overlay manager that handles editing mode on this screen.
fields._button: This is the button to switch to viewing this screen.
fields._iconTexture: This is the texture Component showing the icon for the tab of this screen.
fields._swapRegion: This is the swap region used to show the screen and slide it away/in when it is switched from/to.
fields._currentScreen: The current screen this tutorial screen dialog is showing.
fields._heightField: The field used to enter in and store the user's height setting.
fields._nextEnabled: Whether the next button is enabled or not so the user can continue.

methods.OnNext: Handles when the next screen button is enabled.
methods.OnCreateAccount: Handles when the user asks to create an account.
methods.OnLoginAccount: Handles when the user logs into an account.
methods.OnSkipAccount: Handles when the user skips setting up an account.
methods.OnStartTutorial: Handles when the user asks to start the tutorial world.
